narrative:
Peninsula Vill (precinct in Summit County) has 419 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.4 percentage points.
